name: Workvivo Employee Communication API
what_it_does: Workvivo employee experience and communication platform REST API for HR teams and internal communications professionals to manage company news, employee engagement, recognition, and corporate communications in a social-media-style employee experience platform. Enables AI agents to manage news and article publishing for company communications automation, handle employee recognition and celebration for workplace culture automation, access event creation and company calendar for employee engagement automation, retrieve engagement analytics and content performance for internal communications reporting automation, manage user and group management for communications targeting automation, handle survey and pulse check delivery for employee listening automation, access space and community management for employee community automation, retrieve onboarding content and orientation workflow for new hire experience automation, manage integration with HRIS for employee data synchronization automation, and integrate Workvivo with Zoom, Slack, and HRIS systems for end-to-end employee experience platform management.
use_cases: Publishing company news from internal communications automation agents
Recognizing employees from culture engagement automation agents
Surveying staff from employee listening automation agents
Onboarding new hires from employee experience automation agents
not_for: External customer-facing social media (use LinkedIn or Instagram APIs)
Project management and task tracking (use Asana or Monday.com)
HR core system of record for employee data (use HRIS platforms)
best_when: An HR or internal communications team wanting AI agents to automate company news publishing, employee recognition programs, pulse survey delivery, new hire onboarding content, and engagement analytics within Workvivo's employee experience platform (especially for Zoom-ecosystem organizations).
avoid_when: ZOOM ACQUISITION PLATFORM CONSOLIDATION ROADMAP: Workvivo was acquired by Zoom in 2023; Workvivo is positioned as Zoom's employee experience platform; automated workflow planning should account for Zoom integration deepening and potential feature migration; evaluate whether Workvivo standalone API or Zoom API provides the best long-term integration endpoint for enterprise employee communication automation. GDPR EMPLOYEE COMMUNICATIONS DATA RETENTION: Automated company communications and employee recognition data stored in Workvivo constitutes HR personal data under GDPR; automated data retention policies must comply with GDPR and local employment law record retention requirements; automated deletion of company communications before legal retention period creates compliance gap. RECOGNITION PROGRAM AGGREGATE VALUE TAX REPORTING: Automated employee recognition via Workvivo may include rewards with cash equivalent value; aggregate recognition reward value exceeding IRS de minimis threshold creates taxable employee income requiring W-2 reporting; coordinate with payroll for tax reporting before high-value automated recognition program deployment.

auth.notes: Workvivo uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Cork, Ireland HQ. Founded 2017 by John Goulding and Joe Lennon. Acquired by Zoom in 2023. Employee experience platform as Zoom's internal communications product. Social-media-style employee experience: news feed, recognition, events, communities. Integration with Zoom Meetings and Zoom Team Chat. GDPR. SOC2. Competes with Staffbase, Simpplr, and Firstup for employee communications.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-employee annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per employee; bundled pricing available with Zoom for Zoom customers
pricing.notes: Cork Ireland. Zoom subsidiary since 2023. Per-employee annual subscription. Zoom bundle pricing. GDPR. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; content and user queries throttled; webhooks for engagement and recognition events

known_agent_gotchas: ZOOM ACQUISITION API MIGRATION MONITORING: Workvivo is being integrated into Zoom's platform; Workvivo standalone API may migrate to Zoom API ecosystem; monitor Zoom and Workvivo deprecation notices for API changes resulting from platform integration; automated workflows built on current Workvivo API should monitor migration timeline announcements

CONTENT TARGETING AUDIENCE SEGMENTATION: Workvivo news and communications can be targeted to specific employee groups, locations, or departments; automated content publishing must correctly configure audience targeting; automated company-wide broadcast to all employees for department-specific content creates off-target communication and feed noise for unrelated employees

RECOGNITION BADGE PROGRAM CONFIGURATION DEPENDENCIES: Workvivo employee recognition uses configurable badge programs; automated recognition sending must use currently active badge configuration; automated recognition using deprecated badge types creates failed recognition events; check active badge configuration before automated recognition deployment

PULSE SURVEY RESPONSE CONFIDENTIALITY CONFIGURATION: Workvivo pulse surveys can be configured as anonymous or identified; automated survey analytics must respect configured confidentiality level; automated reporting that attributes identified responses for surveys configured as anonymous creates employee trust violation and GDPR implication for EU employees

HRIS SYNC LATENCY FOR EMPLOYEE DATA ACCURACY: Workvivo employee directory syncs with HRIS on scheduled basis; automated recognition and communications targeting using Workvivo employee data may lag HRIS changes (new hires, terminations, department changes); implement HRIS freshness check for time-sensitive automated targeting to avoid targeting terminated employees or incorrect department groups
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee experience platform. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US. Employee communications, recognition, and engagement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee experience. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US. Employee communications and engagement data.
